verses.text: A vow of persons is valued by age and sex. Vows. Persons devoted are valued by the priest.
A vow of persons is valued by age and sex. Vows. Persons devoted are valued by the priest.
A vow of persons is valued by age and sex. Vows. Persons devoted are valued by the priest.
A vow of persons is valued by age and sex. Vows. Persons devoted are valued by the priest.
The young and the old have their set values. Valued. Each age has its price.
The young and the old have their set values. Valued. Each age has its price.
The young and the old have their set values. Valued. Each age has its price.
If poor, the priest values him; a vowed beast may not be changed. Allowed. God makes room for the poor.
If poor, the priest values him; a vowed beast may not be changed. Allowed. God makes room for the poor.
If poor, the priest values him; a vowed beast may not be changed. Allowed. God makes room for the poor.
An unclean beast vowed is valued and may be redeemed. Redeemed. The unclean is reckoned and bought back.
An unclean beast vowed is valued and may be redeemed. Redeemed. The unclean is reckoned and bought back.
An unclean beast vowed is valued and may be redeemed. Redeemed. The unclean is reckoned and bought back.
A house sanctified may be redeemed with a fifth added. Houses. Vowed houses may be bought back.
A house sanctified may be redeemed with a fifth added. Houses. Vowed houses may be bought back.
A field sanctified is valued by its seed and the jubilee. Fields. Land vows reckon to the jubilee.
A field sanctified is valued by its seed and the jubilee. Fields. Land vows reckon to the jubilee.
A field sanctified is valued by its seed and the jubilee. Fields. Land vows reckon to the jubilee.
A field sanctified is valued by its seed and the jubilee. Fields. Land vows reckon to the jubilee.
If not redeemed, the field becomes the priest's at the jubilee. To the priest. Unredeemed land passes to God's servants.
If not redeemed, the field becomes the priest's at the jubilee. To the priest. Unredeemed land passes to God's servants.
A bought field returns at the jubilee to its owner. Returns. The jubilee restores all.
A bought field returns at the jubilee to its owner. Returns. The jubilee restores all.
A bought field returns at the jubilee to its owner. Returns. The jubilee restores all.
A bought field returns at the jubilee to its owner. Returns. The jubilee restores all.
The firstling is the LORD's already and cannot be vowed. Firstling. What is God's cannot be given again.
The firstling is the LORD's already and cannot be vowed. Firstling. What is God's cannot be given again.
A devoted thing is most holy and not redeemed. Devoted. Some things are wholly God's.
A devoted thing is most holy and not redeemed. Devoted. Some things are wholly God's.
The tithe of the land is the LORD's; redeem it with a fifth. The tithe. A tenth belongs to God.
The tithe of the land is the LORD's; redeem it with a fifth. The tithe. A tenth belongs to God.
The tithe of the herd is holy; these are the commandments. Holy tenth. God claims His portion of all.
The tithe of the herd is holy; these are the commandments. Holy tenth. God claims His portion of all.
The tithe of the herd is holy; these are the commandments. Holy tenth. God claims His portion of all.
